name: Tiefling

compilation_state.summary: Successfully mapped Tiefling race from reference data.

description: Tieflings mature at the same rate as humans but live a few years longer. Tieflings might not have an innate tendency toward evil, but many of them end up there. Evil or not, an independent nature inclines many tieflings toward a chaotic alignment. Tieflings are about the same size and build as humans. Your size is Medium. You can speak, read, and write Common and Infernal.
